query: Draft a commercial suit seeking damages for illegal termination of dealership agreement. Plaintiff invested substantial capital and developed territory market. Termination was arbitrary and contrary to agreement terms. Claim compensation for loss of profit, goodwill and unsold stock. Draft with proper breach of contract pleading for Commercial Court.

limitation.description: For compensation for breach of any contract, express or implied
limitation.accrual: When the contract is broken (date of illegal termination)
limitation.reason: LKB specificity rule: Article 55 is specific to breach_dealership_franchise

detected_court.heading: IN THE COURT OF THE {court_type} (COMMERCIAL DIVISION)
procedural: Section 12A pre-institution mediation (mandatory unless urgent interim relief sought)
Statement of truth as per Commercial Courts Act

Particularised damages schedule showing: (a) methodology for computing loss of profits, (b) basis for goodwill valuation, (c) itemised capital investment with documentary proof, (d) unsold stock valuation at cost or market value whichever is lower
